# CombatStay

> Book Muay Thai and combat sports training camps worldwide.
> Compare real prices, verified gyms, and packages — instant
> booking, no DMs.

CombatStay is an OTA (online travel agency) marketplace connecting combat sports
travelers with gyms offering training, accommodation, and stay-and-train packages
in a single booking. Primary market: Thailand. Global expansion planned.

## About

- **Domain:** https://www.combatstay.com
- **Founded:** 2026
- **Focus:** Thailand — Bangkok, Phuket, Chiang Mai, Pattaya, Krabi, Koh Samui, Koh Phangan, Koh Tao, Hua Hin, and surrounding areas
- **Business model:** 15% commission on completed bookings. No subscription or listing fees for gyms.
- **Disciplines covered:** Muay Thai, MMA, BJJ (Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu), Boxing, Kickboxing, Judo, wrestling, strength & conditioning

## What CombatStay does

- Gym owners list their facilities, packages, and pricing directly on the platform
- Travelers search, compare, and book training camps with real-time availability
- Packages range from training-only day passes to multi-week stay-and-train programs with accommodation and meals
- Instant booking with Stripe payments — no back-and-forth DMs or deposit negotiations
- All listed gyms are verified before appearing in search results

## Key pages

- Homepage: https://www.combatstay.com
- Search / browse gyms: https://www.combatstay.com/search
- Search filtered to Thailand: https://www.combatstay.com/search?country=Thailand
- Blog / training guides: https://www.combatstay.com/blog
- FAQ / help centre: https://www.combatstay.com/faq

## Gym listings

All gym pages follow the pattern:

```
https://www.combatstay.com/gyms/[gym-slug]
```

Example: `https://www.combatstay.com/gyms/tiger-muay-thai`

Gym pages include: photos, amenities, package options with prices, availability calendar, reviews, and an instant-book flow.

## Booking flow

1. **Search** — filter by location, discipline, dates, guests, price
2. **Review** — summary card with gym details, dates, guests, total price, cancellation policy
3. **Your details** — name, email, guest count, discipline preference
4. **Confirm & Pay** — Stripe-powered payment; booking confirmed on success

## Blog — Micro-location guides (suburbs / areas)

Dynamic route: `https://www.combatstay.com/blog/best-muay-thai-gyms/[suburb-slug]`

Examples:
- https://www.combatstay.com/blog/best-muay-thai-gyms/bang-tao
- https://www.combatstay.com/blog/best-muay-thai-gyms/rawai
- https://www.combatstay.com/blog/best-muay-thai-gyms/chalong
- https://www.combatstay.com/blog/best-muay-thai-gyms/kamala

New suburb guides are generated automatically as gyms are added in new areas.

## FAQ categories

The help centre at https://www.combatstay.com/faq covers:

- **Safety & Security** — verified gym process, traveler protections, dispute resolution
- **Bookings** — how to book, modify, or cancel; cancellation policies; confirmation emails
- **Payments & Disputes** — Stripe payments, refund timelines, chargebacks
- **Gyms & Training** — what to expect at a training camp, package types, discipline levels
- **General** — account, contact, platform policies

## Gym data structure (for AI context)

Each gym listing may include:

- Name, slug, city, country, description
- Disciplines (e.g. Muay Thai, MMA, BJJ, Boxing, Kickboxing, Judo)
- Verification status: `verified` or `trusted`
- Images (ordered gallery)
- Amenities: WiFi, accommodation, meals, airport transfer, physiotherapy, recovery facilities, nutritionist, pool, sauna, ice bath, massage
- Packages: name, duration (days/weeks), price per person, includes_accommodation, includes_meals, cancellation_policy_days, meal_plan_details
- Reviews: rating (out of 5), count
- Location: lat/lng, address, Google Maps link

## Package types

Packages broadly fall into:

- **Training Only** — daily/weekly sessions, no accommodation
- **Train & Stay** — accommodation included
- **Train, Stay & Eat** — accommodation + meals included
- **Fight Camp** — intensive competition-prep program

## Pricing context

- Training-only day passes: ~฿500–฿1,200/day (~$14–$35 USD)
- Weekly training packages: ~฿3,000–฿8,000/week (~$85–$230 USD)
- Stay-and-train packages: ~฿8,000–฿35,000/week depending on room type and inclusions
- All prices shown in the user's preferred currency via real-time conversion

## Cancellation policy logic

- `cancellation_policy_days: null` — no stated policy
- `cancellation_policy_days: 0` — non-refundable
- `cancellation_policy_days: N` — free cancellation if cancelled more than N days before check-in

## Content policy

CombatStay does not generate or surface:

- Fictional gym listings
- Unverified pricing
- Legal or medical advice (visa guides are editorial, not legal advice)
- Affiliate-style "top 7" lists without live booking data

All guides are backed by live listings on the platform.

## Contact & links

- Website: https://www.combatstay.com
- Sitemap: https://www.combatstay.com/sitemap.xml
- For gym owners: list your gym via the platform (gym owner portal in-app)
